evals.name: main-paper-end-to-end
evals.prompt: 这是 Nature Climate Change 上的一篇文章，主刊 PDF 在 path/to/main.pdf。把它转成方便阅读的 markdown，图片要在正确位置。
evals.expected_output: A .md file (basename matches the PDF) ≥400 lines, with title/authors/abstract/Main/named H2 sections/Methods+H3 sub-sections/numbered references; a figures/ folder with ≥7 figure PNGs and ≥10 equation PNGs.

evals.name: supplementary-information
evals.prompt: 把同目录下的 SI 文件 path/to/SI.pdf 也转成 markdown。
evals.expected_output: A multi-thousand-line .md, ≥20 figures, no spurious top-level '## Main' heading (SI has no abstract), 'Supplementary information' line not classified as authors. Body font auto-detected as Times 12.0.
